mission.title: kyverno: add special variable substitution logic for preconditions
mission.description:
## Related issue

## Proposed Changes
- Remove variable substitution logic from preconditions evaluation
- Put special variable substitution logic before preconditions evaluation
- Special means "do not fail on error" as described in expected result of the issue

### Proof Manifests
```yaml
apiVersion: kyverno.io/v1
kind: ClusterPolicy
metadata:
  name: set-service-labels
  annotations:
    pod-policies.kyverno.io/autogen-controllers: none
spec:
  background: false
  rules:
    - name: set-servi

steps.title: Apply the configuration
steps.description:
Apply the following configuration to your cluster:
```yaml
apiVersion: kyverno.io/v1
kind: ClusterPolicy
metadata:
  name: set-service-labels
  annotations:
    pod-policies.kyverno.io/autogen-controllers: none
spec:
  background: false
  rules:
    - name: set-service-labels-pods
      match:
        resources:
          kinds:
          - Pod
      exclude:
        resources:
          namespaces:
            - "kube*"
            - "openshift*"
            - "kube-*"
            - "openshift-*"
      preconditions:
        any:
```

steps.title: Verify the fix
steps.description: Confirm that the issue is resolved in your environment by testing the affected functionality.

resolution.summary:
ok, can you please log an issue to track the doc update?

Adding the test scenario:
>My expectation is that if try to create a loadbalancer service without the specific annotation it should be denied. Only if LB service has exactly this annotation it should be allowed
>```
>service.beta.kubernetes.io/azure-load-balancer-internal: "true"
>```
>In terms of AKS cluster lb service with this annotatio will create internal Lb in azure otherwise it will be public

Adding the policy:
```
apiVersion: kyverno.io/v1
kind: ClusterPolicy
metadata:
  annotations:
    meta.helm.sh/release-name: kyverno-policies      
    meta.helm.sh/release-namespace: kyverno
    pod-policies.kyverno.io/autogen-controllers: none
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: Helm
  name: if-baltic-restrict-external-load-balancer
spec:
  background: true
  rules:
  - match:
      resources:
        kinds:
        - Service
    name: match-service-type
    preconditions:
    - key: '{{request.object.spec.type}}'
      operator: Equals
      value: LoadBalancer
    validate:
      deny:
        conditions:
        - key: "{{ request.object.metadata.annotations.\"service.beta.kubernetes.io/azure-load-balancer-internal\"}}"
          operator: NotEquals
          value: "true"
  validationFailureAction: enforce
```

apiVersion: kyverno.io/v1
kind: ClusterPolicy

apiVersion: kyverno.io/v1
kind: ClusterPolicy
metadata:
  name: set-service-labels
  annotations:
    pod-policies.kyverno.io/autogen-controllers: none
spec:
  background: false
  rules:
    - name: set-service-labels-pods
      match:
        resources:
          kinds:
          - Pod
      exclude:
        resources:
          namespaces:
            - "kube*"
            - "openshift*"
            - "kube-*"
            - "openshift-*"
      preconditions:
        any:
          - key: "{{ request.object.metadata.labels.serviceOverride }}"
            operator: NotEquals
            value: "*?"
      mutate:
        patchStrategicMerge:
          metadata:
            labels:
              +(service): "{{ request.object.metadata.labels.app }}"
          spec:
            containers:
              - (name): "*"
                env:
                  - name: "SERVICE"
                    value: "{{ request.object.metadata.labels.app }}"
    - name: set-service-labels-deployments-and-sets
      match:
        resources:
          kinds:
          - Deployment
          - DaemonSet
          - StatefulSet
      exclude:
        resources:
          namespaces:
            - "kube*"
            - "openshift*"
            - "kube-*"
            - "openshift-*"
      preconditions:
        any:
          - key: "{{ request.object.metadata.labels.serviceOverride }}"
            operator: NotEquals
            value: "*?"
      mutate:
        patchStrategicMerge:
          spec:
            template:
              metadata:
                labels:
                  +(service): "{{ request.object.spec.template.metadata.labels.app }}"
              spec:
                containers:
                  - (name): "*"
                    env:
                      - name: "SERVICE"
                        value: "{{ request.object.spec.template.metadata.labels.app }}"

kind: Deployment
apiVersion: apps/v1
metadata:
  name: audit-deployment
  labels:
    app: audit
    name: audit
    service: audit
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: audit
  template:
    metadata:
      creationTimestamp: null
      labels:
        app: audit
        service: audit
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: audit
          image: busybox
          resources:
            limits:
              cpu: 2500m
              memory: 3584Mi
            requests:
              cpu: 1500m
              memory: 2Gi
          imagePullPolicy: Always
      restartPolicy: Always
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
      dnsPolicy: ClusterFirst
      securityContext: {}

spec:

    - name: set-service-labels-deployments-and-sets

          kinds:

          - StatefulSet

      preconditions:

                        value: "{{ request.object.spec.template.metadata.labels.app }}"

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: nginx-deployment
  labels:
    app: nginx
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: nginx
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: nginx
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: nginx
        image: nginx:1.14.2
        ports:
        - containerPort: 80

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with kyverno installed or the issue environment reproducible.
